consistency.type_and_rarity: Consistent. The 'type' is 'Wondrous item' and 'rarity' is 'Uncommon', matching the 'source_type_rarity' field.
consistency.description_and_mechanics: Consistent. The description clearly explains the extradimensional storage capacity and the ease of drawing items, which are the item's core mechanics.

quality.clarity: High. The description is very clear regarding the three distinct compartments and their specific capacities (60 arrows/bolts, 18 javelins, 6 long objects).
quality.completeness: High. It details storage capacity, weight limits (never weighs more than 2 pounds), and the action economy benefit (draw item as normal).

mechanics.primary_effect: Extradimensional storage for three distinct categories of items (small projectiles, medium thrown weapons, long implements).

capacity_details.capacity: Sixty arrows, bolts, or similar objects.

mechanics.weight_limitation: Always weighs no more than 2 pounds, regardless of contents.
mechanics.action_implication: Allows drawing an item as if from a normal quiver or scabbard, implying no special action is required beyond the standard action to draw a weapon/ammo.

analysis.archivist_notes: The item is mechanically sound and its description is comprehensive. The limitation of capacity per compartment is a key feature to track.
